subcodes.first_line: O Ali! Hearken unto that which is being revealed unto thee from this Fire that blazeth forth within this Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا علی فاستمع لما یوحی الیک من هذه النار التی تستضی ء فی هذه الشجره التی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @transcendence; unknowability of God
